variants.title: Donaldson P551168 Fuel Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec AS1111
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P551168 Fuel Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Filtrec AS1111
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Fuel Filters? Donaldson fuel filters are designed to help prevent premature injector and pump wear by delivering cleaner fuel to your engines. • Reliable performance – pressure relief valve allows fuel to rise slowly. • Compatible with existing electronic filter life indicators. • Cellulose media – effectively meets application efficiency and capacity requirements.

variants.title: Filtrec AS1111 Spin-On Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec AS1111. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the AS1111 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
